THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRADEN, JOSEPH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1288 MISSION ST. #406, SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL APR-21-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT NO PHYSICAL EVICTION PRIOR TO 04/21/99. IF DEFENDANT MOVES OUT BY 6:00PM 04/20/99, PLAINTIFF WILL FILE A MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT. PLTFS WAIVE DAMAGES, INCLUDING FEES, COSTS AND PER DIEM.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VLAHOS, JOHN B. VOZIKES, YOTA AS TO DEFENDANT BRADEN, JOSEPH DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED
